raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2503 would enable transit agencies to more rapidly electrify their fleets, improve rail service, and cut emissions.",
    "AB 2503 would exempt railroad electrification projects from the requirements of the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA).",
    "Electric rail runs more efficiently and produces much less air pollution than diesel trains.",
    "Train electrification will improve air quality, speed up train service, and increase ridership.",
    "Many passenger and freight rail lines are reliant on diesel locomotives that emit greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "Attaining reductions in Vehicles Miles Traveled (VMT) includes investments in making transit a viable alternative to driving.",
    "By granting CEQA streamlining for rail electrification, AB 2503 would enable transit agencies to improve rail service and advance California’s climate goals."
  ]
}
```
